notes: Eval 1 (ACR rate limit) passes 100% for both configurations - this is well-known knowledge, skill doesn't add differentiation here
Eval 2 (Trivy without Docker) is the strongest differentiator: with_skill 100% vs without_skill 40%. The ACR task pattern for running Trivy is the key value-add
Eval 3 (Dockerfile review) passes 100% for both - general security knowledge is strong without the skill
The skill's primary value is in the ACR-specific operational patterns (importing tools, running scans via ACR tasks) rather than general security knowledge
